name: Firmware Corruption Attempt
description: Detects tools and commands that modify firmware or BIOS settings
query:
// Detect firmware modification attempts
// Trigger on flashrom, fwupdate, or BIOS manipulation tools
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(flashrom|fwupd|fwupdmgr|efibootmgr.*-[dDcC]|dd.*if=.*of=/dev/sda$|bcdedit.*/bootstatuspolicy)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
